title: Ubiquiti UVC-AI-DSLR - UVC AI Wide angle bullet camera, 8MP, 52°
description: The camera from the UniFi Protect family features an incredible 4/3" 10MP sensor (3840 x 2160px) at 30 fps with incredible low-light performance, attachable varifocal wide-angle 17mm lens from Olympus and audio microphone and speaker with the option to turn off - the speaker will be turned off automatically when the outer cover is attached.The camera has a durable chassis and thanks to the robust outer cover made of aluminum, IPX5 water resistance is guaranteed The camera can only be connected to the network using Gigabit LAN with support for power supply via PoE (37 to 57V DC) with a maximum consumption of 17.7W. The camera supports H.264 compression and thanks to the powerful CPU it supports intelligent AI detection of movement, people, cars and license plates 4/3" 10MP sensor , 30 FPS video (reduced to 8MP, max. 3840 x 2160px) IPX5 protection against weather and water Built-in microphone and speaker with software shutdown option Power supply via PoE (37 to 57V DC) Advanced AI detection of people, vehicles, recognizes license plates and more Managed by UniFi Protect software - 2.2.2 (web) / 1.7.0 (iOS and Android) Device Varifocal lens Outer cover Screws + dowels Wall or mast holder GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
